nasb.text: If it please my father to do you harm, may the Lord do so to Jonathan and more also, if I do not make it known to you and send you away, that you may go in safety. And may the Lord be with you as He has been with my father.

esv.text: But should it please my father to do you harm, the Lord do so to Jonathan and more also if I do not disclose it to you and send you away, that you may go in safety. May the Lord be with you, as he has been with my father.

cnv.text: 假如我父親有意要害你，我若是不告訴你，不讓你走，不使你平平安安地離去，願耶和華加倍懲罰我。願耶和華與你同在，好像從前與我父親同在一樣。

ccb.text: 如果他有意杀你，而我却不告诉你让你安然逃走，愿耶和华重重地惩罚我。愿耶和华与你同在，像从前与我父亲同在一样。
